category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the Joyent Triton CLI; official npm README describes triton as a CLI for Triton public and private clouds.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description is Joyent Triton CLI; official package README refers to the command-line tool as triton/Triton CLI.
docs_sources: Official Triton DataCenter docs provide a Triton CLI page; official node-triton README documents installation, configuration, and SDK usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official npm package metadata and README list github.com/TritonDataCenter/node-triton as the repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Joyent Triton CLI; official README describes CloudAPI management for Triton public and private clouds.
